sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39385" key="e)pizugo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιζῠγ-όω</orth>, <sense id="n39385.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shut to</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὰς θύρας</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:1:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.4</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
